---
title: "Literature Review"
---

## Theoretical framework

Identify the theoretical traditions your work engages with. Cite foundational
works using `[@bibtex-key]` syntax — entries live in `../references.bib`.

## Current state of the field

What does the existing literature say about your research question? Map the
landscape: who are the major voices, what positions do they hold, where are
the gaps?

## Positioning your contribution

Locate your work within the literature. What gap does it fill? What
conversations does it extend? What does it dispute, if anything?

## Synthesis

A short synthesis paragraph that motivates the methodology chapter.
